name: smart-iot-api
description: Backend API for Smart IoT Dashboard

scripts.dev: sh -c 'PIDS=$(lsof -tiTCP:3001 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then kill $PIDS; fi; nodemon nest-server.js'
scripts.dev:legacy: sh -c 'PIDS=$(lsof -tiTCP:3001 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then kill $PIDS; fi; nodemon server.js'
